mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RN, p.* FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT wh.wh_id AS whId, wh.wh_name AS whName, wh.wh_type AS whTypeNo, wt.wh_type_name AS whTypeName, wh.wh_qty AS whQty, NVL(lot_sum.whPrevQty, 0) AS whPrevQty, CASE WHEN wh.wh_qty > 0 THEN ROUND(NVL(lot_sum.whPrevQty, 0) / wh.wh_qty * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS whUsageRate, wh.wh_img AS whImg, wt.wh_type_content AS whTypeContent, glog.glog_date AS lastGlogDate FROM warehouse wh
LEFT OUTER JOIN wh_type wt ON wh.wh_type = wt.wh_type_no
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ws.wh_sec_whid AS whId, COUNT(lot.lot_id) AS whPrevQty FROM lot lot
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT lu.use_lot AS lotId, SUM(NVL(lu.use_qty, 0)) AS totalUseQty FROM lot_use lu GROUP BY lu.use_lot ) use_sum ON lot.lot_id = use_sum.lotId
INNER JOIN wh_sec ws ON ws.wh_sec_id = CASE WHEN lot.lot_qc = 'N' THEN lot.lot_bwhsec WHEN lot.lot_qc = 'Y' THEN lot.lot_awhsec END
WHERE lot.lot_status IN (10, 20) AND ( NVL(lot.lot_fqty, 0) - NVL(use_sum.totalUseQty, 0) ) > 0
GROUP BY ws.wh_sec_whid ) lot_sum ON wh.wh_id = lot_sum.whId
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT glog.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY glog.glog_whid ORDER BY glog.glog_date DESC ) AS rn FROM ghp_log glog ) WHERE rn = 1 ) glog ON wh.wh_id = glog.glog_whid
WHERE wh.wh_usage = 'Y'
AND wh.wh_type = #{whDTO.searchType}
AND ( UPPER(wh.wh_name) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{whDTO.searchKeyword} || '%')) OR UPPER(wh.wh_id) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{whDTO.searchKeyword} || '%')) )
) base
WHERE 1 = 1
AND base.whPrevQty > 0
AND base.whQty > 0 AND base.whPrevQty / base.whQty < 0.8
AND base.whQty > 0 AND base.whPrevQty / base.whQty >= 0.8 AND base.whPrevQty / base.whQty < 1
AND base.whQty > 0 AND base.whPrevQty / base.whQty >= 1
ORDER BY whTypeNo, whId ) p ) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{page.startRow} AND #{page.endRow}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalWhCnt, SUM( CASE WHEN whPrevQty > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS usingWhCnt, SUM( CASE WHEN wh_qty > 0 AND whPrevQty / wh_qty < 0.8 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS safeWhCnt, SUM( CASE WHEN wh_qty > 0 AND whPrevQty / wh_qty >= 0.8 AND whPrevQty / wh_qty < 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS dangerWhCnt, SUM( CASE WHEN wh_qty > 0 AND whPrevQty / wh_qty >= 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS overWhCnt FROM ( SELECT wh.wh_id, wh.wh_qty, NVL(lot_sum.whPrevQty, 0) AS whPrevQty FROM warehouse wh LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ws.wh_sec_whid AS whId, COUNT(lot.lot_id) AS whPrevQty FROM lot lot LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT lu.use_lot AS lotId, SUM(NVL(lu.use_qty, 0)) AS totalUseQty FROM lot_use lu GROUP BY lu.use_lot ) use_sum ON lot.lot_id = use_sum.lotId
INNER JOIN wh_sec ws ON ws.wh_sec_id = CASE WHEN lot.lot_qc = 'N' THEN lot.lot_bwhsec WHEN lot.lot_qc = 'Y' THEN lot.lot_awhsec END WHERE lot.lot_status IN (10, 20) AND ( NVL(lot.lot_fqty, 0) - NVL(use_sum.totalUseQty, 0) ) > 0
GROUP BY ws.wh_sec_whid ) lot_sum ON wh.wh_id = lot_sum.whId WHERE wh.wh_usage = 'Y' )

SELECT wh.wh_id AS whId, wh.wh_name AS whName, wh.wh_type AS whTypeNo, wt.wh_type_name AS whTypeName, wh.wh_qty AS whQty, NVL(lot_sum.whPrevQty, 0) AS whPrevQty, CASE WHEN wh.wh_qty > 0 THEN ROUND(NVL(lot_sum.whPrevQty, 0) / wh.wh_qty * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS whUsageRate, wh.wh_img AS whImg, wt.wh_type_content AS whTypeContent, glog.glog_date AS lastGlogDate FROM warehouse wh
LEFT OUTER JOIN wh_type wt ON wh.wh_type = wt.wh_type_no
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ws.wh_sec_whid AS whId, COUNT(lot.lot_id) AS whPrevQty FROM lot lot
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT lu.use_lot AS lotId, SUM(NVL(lu.use_qty, 0)) AS totalUseQty FROM lot_use lu GROUP BY lu.use_lot ) use_sum ON lot.lot_id = use_sum.lotId
INNER JOIN wh_sec ws ON ws.wh_sec_id = CASE WHEN lot.lot_qc = 'N' THEN lot.lot_bwhsec WHEN lot.lot_qc = 'Y' THEN lot.lot_awhsec END
WHERE lot.lot_status IN (10, 20) AND ( NVL(lot.lot_fqty, 0) - NVL(use_sum.totalUseQty, 0) ) > 0
GROUP BY ws.wh_sec_whid ) lot_sum ON wh.wh_id = lot_sum.whId
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT glog.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY glog.glog_whid ORDER BY glog.glog_date DESC ) AS rn FROM ghp_log glog ) WHERE rn = 1 ) glog ON wh.wh_id = glog.glog_whid
WHERE wh.wh_usage = 'Y' and wh.wh_id = #{whId}
select count(*) from ghp_log glog where upper(glog.glog_whid) = upper(#{whId})

SELECT glog.glog_id glogId, glog.glog_date glogDate, glog.glog_worker glogWorker, E.emp_name glogWName, glog.glog_value glogValue, glog.glog_result glogResult, glog.glog_action glogAction, glog.glog_adate glogAdate, glog.glog_img glogImg, glog.glog_memo glogMemo, glog.glog_cdate glogCdate, glog.glog_whid glogWhId, glog.glog_wpid glogWpId, ghp.ghp_id ghpId, ghp.ghp_name ghpName, ghp.ghp_category ghpCategory, ghp.ghp_standard ghpStandard, ghp.ghp_check_method ghpCheckMethod, ghp.ghp_cycle ghpCycle, ghp.ghp_wh_type ghpWhType, ghp.ghp_wp_type ghpWpType, ghp.GHP_MIN_VALUE ghpMinValue, ghp.GHP_MAX_VALUE ghpMaxValue, ghp.ghp_unit ghpUnit FROM ghp_log glog LEFT OUTER JOIN GHP ghp ON glog.GLOG_GHP = ghp.GHP_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EMP E ON glog.GLOG_WORKER = E.EMP_ID WHERE glog.glog_usage = 'Y' and upper(glog.glog_whid) = upper(#{whId})
